title: Dance Madness
writer: S. Jay Kaufman, Frederica Sagor Maas
actors: Claire Windsor, Conrad Nagel, Hedda Hopper
plot: Set in New York City (Washington Square & elsewhere) & Paris, Millicent Russell wants her daughter May to be a social triumph. The Russell's live in a mansion, but can hardly afford it. The Russell's want May to marry Roger Halladay,
